title: fix: use cost fallback for grok pricing
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Grok metadata and billing update
gist.blurb: We've updated the billing logic and metadata for Grok models to ensure sustainable access to their massive 262k context windows.
gist.summary: Fixed a pricing override for Grok models to accurately reflect provider costs and updated metadata to support 262k context and multimodal inputs.
gist.impact: Users will see accurate credit usage for Grok models, ensuring reliable access to its advanced reasoning capabilities.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee and the Nomnom creature reviewing a long, glowing receipt or document, representing the updated billing and massive context window.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses and the round Nomnom creature reviewing a long, glowing receipt sprouting from a retro terminal. A small code-plant grows in a lime green (#ecf874) pot nearby. Soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, nostalgic but beautiful.
